text:
どう？　結構息切れしたんじゃない？
でもあなた、いい感じだったよ！

ずばずばっとキメると気持ちいいよね。
いくつ倒したか途中でわからなくなる
くらい、あなたノリノリだったし。

そんなあなたを満足させる
超すごい訓練用メニューも
そろそろ考えないとなー。

あなた、きっとまだまだ伸びるよ。
必ず

How was that? Left you fighting to catch your
breath, did it? You looked great out there,
though!

Feels great to slice and dice like it's no
one's business, eh? You seemed so into it I
wasn't sure if you were even keeping count!

I think I better start working up my next
training plan so I can really blow you away
next time.

You and your katana are really set to go
places, so make sure you come by for
some more.
